content.en:
Another long time has passed.

this day.

A batch of Xuanwu Demon Crystal materials were sent to the Terran Holy Country, which was obtained by the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce from one branch after another, and many places could only trade a little bit of Xuanwu Demon Crystal materials, but after a long time, there were more Xuanwu Demon Crystal materials obtained from trading.

If you accumulate it, the amount is naturally quite considerable.

The Terran Holy Land Chamber of Commerce all thought that the Terran was going to study these substances, but they didn't know that it was Ye Tian and they needed these Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances to cultivate.

......

"That's right, I've collected a lot of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal materials, which can be used for me and my wife and children to cultivate. "

Ye Tian was very excited to refine these Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances to refine his Eternal Dao Seed.

However, he was already a mid-level cultivator in the Eternal Realm God Realm, and it was naturally more difficult for him to ascend to the Eternal Dao Seed of "Four Eight Zero", while it was easier for his wife and children to ascend to the Eternal Dao Seed.

Therefore, his wife and children will take the lead in raising the current Eternal Dao to the limit, so as to break the shackles and break through the realm.

Another long time has passed.

On this day, his wife Xiao Yue successfully raised the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, and then went to condense the third perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

It didn't take long for Xiao Yue to break through successfully, and her cultivation reached the peak of the first level of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

However, because her foundation is not weak, and she has condensed the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed and the Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit, her combat power is still very strong, no less than the middle-level powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Soon after Xiao Yue's breakthrough, Ye Xingyue also successfully raised the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, and also began to condense the third perfect level Eternal Realm Spirit, and also successfully broke through.

After that, it was Ye Xingchen's turn.

Ye Xingchen condensed the third Eternal Realm Spirit, and after completing the breakthrough, his strength skyrocketed.

It can be said that Ye Xingchen's strength is stronger than Xiao Yue and Ye Xingyue, after all, his foundation is the strongest, and his combat power is no less than that of the weaker Eternal Realm Divine Realm Middle-Order Realm God who condenses the five Eternal Realm Spirits.

With the breakthrough of Ye Xingchen, Xiao Yue, and Ye Xingyue, the strength of the human race naturally skyrocketed.

And.

After Ye Xingchen's strength breaks through, even if he encounters a realm god who has condensed five eternal realm spirits in the future, he will be able to deal with one or two, even if he can't beat it, he will not be crushed in an instant, and he has the strength to resist, so that the other party will be afraid of one or two, which is enough.

Therefore, Ye Tian can also worry less.

In order to make the strength of the Terran Holy Kingdom continue to grow, Ye Tian began to continuously send the Terran Saint Kingdom to the Terran Holy Country, and the Realm Gods cultivated by the Endless Kingdom Alliance were sent to the Terran Holy Kingdom of the Realm God Kingdom one by one.

Under normal circumstances, it is not easy for the Boundary God of the Eternal Kingdom to go to the Boundary God Realm, and he needs to come up with a lot of battle points.

And Ye Tian later sent his son Ye Xingchen and them to the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, and they also used the quota exchanged for battle points, if they didn't exchange it, it would be smuggling.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also took out a lot of resources to cultivate the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm of the Human Race, striving to make the number of Realm Gods of the Human Race exceed one hundred.

Before you know it, another 10 billion solstice era has passed.

this day.

The realm gods of the human race have already surpassed a hundred, but they are all ordinary realm gods, after all, it is not so easy to condense the eternal realm spirit, even if Ye Tian has already taken out some top-grade eternal realm spirit inheritance, but if he does not raise the eternal Dao seed to a certain level, the success rate of the breakthrough is too low, and once he fails, he will be weak for a long time.

If you fail many times, you will even lose the foundation of the Eternal Dao Seed.

Therefore, if the human race wants to cultivate a large number of Eternal Realm God Realm Beginner Realm Gods, it must need to accumulate more long years, and it is not something that can be cultivated with more resources.

Ye Xingchen, Xiao Yue, Ye Xingyue and other relatives were able to break through so quickly, it was entirely because of the perfect-level Eternal Dao Species, and the Eternal Demon Pillar Assistance, plus the assistance of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Substance, otherwise how could they condense the three Eternal Realm Spirits so quickly!

......

More and more realm gods have been cultivated, and the realm gods of the Eternal Kingdom have been transported to the Terran Holy Country one by one, and then enter the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce, strengthening the strength of the Chamber of Commerce, so that the business of the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce has opened up to many eternal countries and powerful spheres of influence, and the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material collected is naturally more.

But Ye Tian's resources were also rapidly consumed, after all, if he expanded the business scope of the Terran Holy Kingdom Alliance at the beginning, he would invest too much, and he would definitely make money at a loss......

It's just that Ye Tian's family has a big business, and he has obtained a lot of resources, otherwise he really can't bear it.

But it's still worth exchanging resources for the improvement of strength.

this day.

The Terran Saint Country Chamber of Commerce brought Ye Tian a very useful piece of information.

Ye Tian asked.

Ye Xingchen hurriedly said: "Father, it should be true, there is a boundary crack in the border between the powerful force of the Eastern Wu Realm, the Star River Boundary Alliance and the top force Taihe Holy Sect, and this boundary crack is relatively large, and this boundary gap does have a Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Mine, and it has only been discovered not long ago." The Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance is of little use to the Realm Gods, and the Eternal Demon Seed of the Demon Seed has undergone a special change, although there are no side effects of absorbing the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal, the effect is not good, far inferior to the Eternal Dao Seed. Therefore, the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal is only one of the materials for refining weapons for the demon seeds, and they are not too eager for this material. Therefore, this deposit has never been fully developed. "

"If this news is true, it is indeed a good thing, you don't go in, I will go in myself!"

Ye Tian said.

That boundary crack must be extremely dangerous, his copy body goes in, if it falls, it will be fine, and he can send another 5.6 copy body at any time.

But if Ye Xingchen goes in and falls, then he really falls, he can't resurrect Ye Xingchen now, and the means of resurrection in the past can't resurrect an Eternal Realm God Realm!

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

He really didn't dare to go in, it was rumored that in that realm, there were even demon seeds comparable to condensing six Eternal Realm Spirit Realm gods, even if there was a high-level demon seed comparable to the Eternal Realm God Realm, it was not impossible.

Where would he dare to go in and take risks, if he was not careful, he would fall. []

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sent a replica body to the boundary rift.

......

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to cross a large number of eternal realms and rush to that boundary rift.

Wow!

Ye Tian directly passed through the entrance of the boundary crack and entered this boundary crack.
